choices.name: x1MO50OFF
choices.choiceText: 1MO50OFF-SALES

choices.name: x3MO50OFF
choices.choiceText: 3MO50OFF-SALES

rules.name: Contact_is_Already_Populated_on_Opp
rules.label: Contact is Already Populated on Opp

rightValue.stringValue: Contact already in JG as Admin (No Billing)
Contact already in JG as Admin
Contact already in JG as Super Admin

Flow.description: Allows rep to verify relevant Account/Contact/Opportunity information and calls JungleGym Http callout on submit JH 8/15/25: updated to get the contact role on the opp and populate the contact

formulas.name: for_ContactMatchReason
formulas.expression: IF( {!Get_User_Object_for_contact.User_Role__c} = "admin", "Contact already in JG as Admin", IF( {!Get_User_Object_for_contact.User_Role__c} = "admin_no_billing", "Contact already in JG as Admin (No Billing)", IF( {!Get_User_Object_for_contact.User_Role__c} = "billing_only", "Contact already in JG as Billing Only", IF( {!Get_User_Object_for_contact.User_Role__c} = "Guardian", "Contact already in JG as Guardian", IF( {!Get_User_Object_for_contact.User_Role__c} = "lead_teacher", "Contact already in JG as Lead Teacher", IF( {!Get_User_Object_for_contact.User_Role__c} = "org_reporter", "Contact already in JG as Org Reporter", IF( {!Get_User_Object_for_contact.User_Role__c} = "super_admin", "Contact already in JG as Super Admin", IF( {!Get_User_Object_for_contact.User_Role__c} = "teacher", "Contact already in JG as Teacher", IF( {!Get_User_Object_for_contact.User_Role__c} = "teacher_no_messaging", "Contact already in JG as Teacher (No Messaging)", "Contact already in JG with Undefined Role" ) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) )

formulas.name: for_Country
formulas.expression: IF( {!con.MailingCountry} = {!Canada}, 'Canada', IF( OR( {!con.MailingCountry} = 'USA', {!con.MailingCountry} = 'US', {!con.MailingCountry} = 'United States', {!con.MailingCountry} = 'United States of America' ), {!US}, '' ) )

Flow.label: Opportunity - Screen - Create JungleGym Account

fields.name: uuidPopulated
fields.fieldText:
This contact is already associated with an Account in JungleGym as a Parent or Teacher. In order to create an Account for this school, a new email address is required for the contact.


View Contact in Salesforce


View Contact in JungleGym

fields.name: Existing_account_has_been_deactivated_in_JG
fields.fieldText: Existing account has been deactivated in JG

fields.name: oppHasUUID
fields.fieldText: This Opportunity already has already been sent to JungleGym. If the sync failed please create the Account and Subscription manually.

fields.name: Deactivate_Text
fields.fieldText: The JungleGym Account for this contact must be deactivated in order to continue.

fields.name: valueChangeWarning
fields.fieldText: Fields changed in this screen will override the information on the Salesforce record.﻿

fields.name: accountExistsText
fields.fieldText: 🚨 This Account already exists in JungleGym. The existing Account will be updated, a new Account will not be created.🚨

rightValue.stringValue: Contact already in JG as Admin
Contact already in JG as Admin (No Billing)
Contact already in JG as Super Admin

validationRule.errorMessage: First Bill Date cannot be in the past.﻿

fields.name: submitWarning
fields.fieldText: Clicking Submit will create an Account and Subscription in JungleGym using the information in this popup.﻿

fields.name: noContacts
fields.fieldText: This Opportunity does not have a contact populated. Please go back to the Opportunity and add the Admin to the Contact field.
